title: Mekanism: Greedy Canteen
description: Modifies Mekanism's Canteen to drink Nutritional Paste until saturation is full. Also supports Nutritional Injection Unit as well!
body:
# Mekanism: Greedy Canteen
A Minecraft mod that modifies Mekanism's Canteen to drink Nutritional Paste until saturation is full.

Also supports Nutritional Injection Unit as well!

![Canteen tooltip](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d80f8f29-61f1-4269-b2e8-d10375ce6d33)

### Default Behavior (Hold Shift) ☹️

![Default Behavior](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/f921cd8d-fc3b-4f75-8fc8-00491b4ddb6e)

### *Greedy* Behavior 🥰

![Greedy Behavior](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d2493d6d-7992-4a82-aa5c-89e7d05167a5)
